basic_details.job_title: Suryapet Anganwadi Teacher & Helper Recruitment 2026: 131 Vacancies, Apply Online from 13 July
basic_details.short_information: The District Women, Child, Disabled and Senior Citizens Welfare Department, Suryapet District (Telangana), has released a notification for 131 Anganwadi posts - 67 Anganwadi Teacher (AWT) and 64 Anganwadi Helper/Ayah (AWH) vacancies. The notification covers vacant posts across five projects in the district. Online applications are being accepted from 13 July 2026 to 24 July 2026.

application_fee.details: Application fee details are not specified in the available notification.

age_limit.details: Applicant candidates must be between 18 and 35 years of age. Category-wise age relaxation details are not specified in the available notification.

qualification.details: Only women candidates are eligible to apply for both AWT and AWH posts Candidates must apply for the Anganwadi Centre located in their own village, habitation, or ward of residence | Anganwadi Teacher (AWT): Minimum qualification of Intermediate (Inter) pass Anganwadi Helper/Ayah (AWH): Intermediate qualification is preferred; however, in tribal (Girijan) areas, if Intermediate-qualified candidates are not available, candidates who have passed SSC will be considered

salary_details.details: Salary or honorarium details for the Anganwadi Teacher and Helper posts are not specified in the available notification.

selection_process: Selection is based on merit derived from Intermediate examination marks The District Selection Committee conducts the selection process Interviews are held for shortlisted candidates
and roster (reservation) rules are followed during selection Reservation categories applicable per post - as indicated in the official roster - include SC
and further selection stage details are not yet released.

physical_eligibility.details: Applications must be submitted fully online during the notified window Candidates should identify the Anganwadi Centre corresponding to their village, habitation, or ward of residence from the official vacancy roster Apply only for the Anganwadi Centre applicable to their residence - applications for centres outside the candidate's residence area are not permitted Submit the completed application within the application window: 13.07.2026 to 24.07.2026 | The specific online application portal/website link is not specified in the available notification.

important_instructions: Only women candidates are eligible to apply Candidates must apply strictly for the Anganwadi Centre in their own residential village, habitation, or ward Minimum qualification for Anganwadi Teacher posts is Intermediate; for Helper posts in tribal areas, SSC-passed candidates may be considered if Intermediate candidates are unavailable Selection will strictly follow roster/reservation norms as indicated against each vacant post Candidates should verify the reservation category applicable to their target Anganwadi Centre before applying

all_official_links.label: Download Suryapet Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Notification PDF

rows.details: District Women, Child, Disabled and Senior Citizens Welfare Department, Suryapet District
Merit (Intermediate marks) + interview by District Selection Committee

content_sections.heading: Suryapet Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: Interview and merit list dates are not specified in the available notification.

content_sections.heading: Suryapet Anganwadi Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: A total of 131 vacancies (67 Anganwadi Teacher, 64 Anganwadi Helper) have been notified across five projects in Suryapet district: Chivvemla, Thungathurthy, Huzurnagar, Suryapet Urban, and Kodad. The district has 1,209 Anganwadi Centres in total. The official department roster lists each vacant Anganwadi Centre individually, along with its AWC ID, mandal, sector, and the reservation category applicable to that specific post (SC, ST, BC-A, BC-B, OC, EWS, OH, VH, HH, or General). A sample of entries from the Chivvemla project is shown below: Note: The full centre-wise roster contains all 131 vacant posts with individual AWC IDs and reservation details. Candidates should refer to the complete official list to identify the specific Anganwadi Centre applicable to their village, habitation, or ward, since applications must be submitted only for the centre corresponding to the candidate's place of residence.

content_sections.heading: Suryapet Anganwadi Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Only women candidates are eligible to apply for both AWT and AWH posts Candidates must apply for the Anganwadi Centre located in their own village, habitation, or ward of residence Anganwadi Teacher (AWT): Minimum qualification of Intermediate (Inter) pass Anganwadi Helper/Ayah (AWH): Intermediate qualification is preferred; however, in tribal (Girijan) areas, if Intermediate-qualified candidates are not available, candidates who have passed SSC will be considered

content_sections.heading: Suryapet Anganwadi Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Applicant candidates must be between 18 and 35 years of age. Category-wise age relaxation details are not specified in the available notification.

content_sections.heading: Suryapet Anganwadi Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Salary or honorarium details for the Anganwadi Teacher and Helper posts are not specified in the available notification.

content_sections.heading: Suryapet Anganwadi Application Fee
content_sections.text: Application fee details are not specified in the available notification.

content_sections.heading: Suryapet Anganwadi Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Selection is based on merit derived from Intermediate examination marks The District Selection Committee conducts the selection process Interviews are held for shortlisted candidates, and roster (reservation) rules are followed during selection Reservation categories applicable per post - as indicated in the official roster - include SC, ST, BC-A, BC-B, OC, EWS, OH (Orthopedically Handicapped), VH (Visually Handicapped), and HH (Hearing Handicapped) Exact interview dates, venue, and further selection stage details are not yet released .

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Suryapet Anganwadi Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted fully online during the notified window Candidates should identify the Anganwadi Centre corresponding to their village, habitation, or ward of residence from the official vacancy roster Apply only for the Anganwadi Centre applicable to their residence - applications for centres outside the candidate's residence area are not permitted Submit the completed application within the application window: 13.07.2026 to 24.07.2026 The specific online application portal/website link is not specified in the available notification.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only women candidates are eligible to apply Candidates must apply strictly for the Anganwadi Centre in their own residential village, habitation, or ward Minimum qualification for Anganwadi Teacher posts is Intermediate; for Helper posts in tribal areas, SSC-passed candidates may be considered if Intermediate candidates are unavailable Selection will strictly follow roster/reservation norms as indicated against each vacant post Candidates should verify the reservation category applicable to their target Anganwadi Centre before applying

faq.question: Q1. How many Anganwadi vacancies are there in Suryapet district in 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 131 vacancies have been notified - 67 Anganwadi Teacher (AWT) and 64 Anganwadi Helper/Ayah (AWH) posts.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification required for Anganwadi Teacher in Suryapet?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Intermediate (Inter) as the minimum qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification for Anganwadi Helper posts?
faq.answer: Intermediate qualification is preferred. In tribal (Girijan) areas, if Intermediate candidates are unavailable, SSC-passed candidates are considered.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Suryapet Anganwadi recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 35 years of age.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to apply for Suryapet Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window closes on 24 July 2026. Applications opened on 13 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the last date to apply for Suryapet Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. Only women candidates are eligible to apply for these posts.

faq.question: Q7. How is the Anganwadi Teacher merit list prepared?
faq.answer: The merit list is prepared based on Intermediate examination marks, and the District Selection Committee conducts the selection following applicable roster/reservation rules.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates apply to any Anganwadi Centre of their choice?
faq.answer: No. Candidates must apply only for the Anganwadi Centre located in their own village, habitation, or ward of residence.
